_note: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE — shape only. Replaced at build time by the real eql-manifest.json from the eql-docs release asset once cipherstash/encrypt-query-language#364 ships. Do not treat these signatures as authoritative.
name: eql

functions.name: hmac_256
functions.brief: Extract the HMAC-SHA-256 equality term from an encrypted value.
functions.description: Backs equality (`=`, `IN`, joins) on `_eq` and `text_search` columns.

functions.name: bloom_filter
functions.brief: Extract the bloom-filter match term from an encrypted value.

functions.name: ore_block_256
functions.brief: Extract the ORE ordering term from an encrypted value.
functions.description: Backs range and ordering (`<`, `>`, `ORDER BY`) on `_ord` columns.
